codeReview.summary: The prove-first Lane 03 packet stays inside the intended governance boundary: it adds a dedicated boundary decision note, links it from the lane spec plus the O2C, P2P, manufacturing/inventory, finance/reporting, backlog, and risk-register surfaces, and leaves runtime code, migrations, flags, and OpenAPI untouched. The new note clearly names the canonical dispatch and purchase-invoice accounting boundaries, the explicitly noncanonical listener/manual-repair paths, the targeted proof pack, rollback owner/rule, stop rule, and downstream consumers for later Lane 03 packets, so the milestone now has the required authoritative planning artifact before implementation scope widens.

summary: PASS. Lane 03 now opens with a narrow proof-first accounting-boundary packet that records the canonical truth model, proof pack, rollback/stop conditions, and downstream guarantees without mixing runtime changes.
